It seems that you have an old distfile. Try to delete it and refetch from one 
of MASTER_SITESs. Correct checksum is: 
$ md5 /usr/ports/distfiles/gnome-db-0.2.93.tar.gz 
MD5 (/usr/ports/distfiles/gnome-db-0.2.93.tar.gz) = c19e062606e6780581fd9309deb91da8
